---
name: Research Task
about: Open or track a Phase 2 historical research task (e.g. HIS-001)
title: "[TASK-ID] <short title>"
labels: research
---

## Task ID

<!-- e.g. HIS-001 -->

## Objective

State the single investment-relevant question this task answers. Do not restate a general historical topic.

## Brief

Link to the governing research brief: `governance/<TASK-ID>_RESEARCH_BRIEF.md`

## Deliverables

- [ ] Research Execution Plan
- [ ] Evidence Ledger
- [ ] Source Register
- [ ] Historical draft (`REV-HIST-###`)
- [ ] Candidate pattern(s) (`PAT-###`), only if evidence supports promotion
- [ ] Historical mapping (`MAP-###`), including critical differences

## Current Review Gate

<!-- One of: Gate 1 Research Design / Gate 2 Evidence Sufficiency / Gate 3 Historical Stability / Gate 4 Mapping Quality / Gate 5 Thesis Eligibility -->

## Stopping Conditions

- [ ] Historical mechanism is sufficiently clear
- [ ] Major scholarly disputes documented
- [ ] Investor-return evidence adequate
- [ ] Candidate patterns supported or rejected
- [ ] AI analogy has explicit boundaries
- [ ] Remaining gaps are non-critical

Do not continue the task merely to accumulate more sources once these are met.
